title: Project Settings
description: Manage your project configuration and preferences

general.title: General Information
general.subtitle: Manage general information of your project
general.slug_description: Used in URLs. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens are allowed.
general.slug_error: Project slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
general.visibility_description: Control who can access this project. Members always have full access based on their role.

danger_zone.title: Danger Zone
danger_zone.description: These actions cannot be undone. Please proceed with caution.
danger_zone.archive_description: Archive this project and make it read-only
danger_zone.delete_description: Permanently delete this project and all its data
